metadata.description: Bridge plugins connecting Claude Code to external coding agents (OpenAI Codex, Google Antigravity).

plugins.name: codex
plugins.description: Delegate image generation, hard reasoning, code review, browser tasks, session resume, and arbitrary execs to OpenAI Codex CLI via a structured 5-section handoff spec.

plugins.name: agy
plugins.description: Delegate coding tasks — multi-file edits, refactors, code review, codebase analysis — to Google's Antigravity CLI (agy).
